C01.taglineZh: 你的开荒本能在今年加倍发声
C01.taglineEn: Your pioneering instinct doubles down this year

C02.taglineZh: 把同一件作品再雕一层

C03.taglineZh: 今年的旗帜比过去更大更鲜明
C03.taglineEn: Your banner flies higher than ever

C04.taglineZh: 一个舞台不够,今年有两个
C04.taglineEn: One stage isn't enough this year

C05.taglineZh: 再次为同一个承诺续约
C05.taglineEn: Renew your vow to the same promise

C06.taglineEn: The fine work this year is on yourself

C07.taglineZh: 把上一版结构推翻重来

C08.taglineEn: Your distance hasn't reached its edge

C09.taglineZh: 摧毁是为了第二次再造

C10.taglineZh: 把同一首歌唱出两段声部

C11.taglineEn: The eyes you lit are still hungry

C12.taglineZh: 你看到的天空,今年要再宽一格

L01.taglineEn: Old dream not yet faded, new one already woven

L02.taglineZh: 上一次的平衡需要再校一次

L04.taglineZh: 今年的桌比去年长一倍
L04.taglineEn: This year's table runs twice as long

L05.taglineZh: 你护着的人需要你更稳一些
L05.taglineEn: The one you guard needs you steadier

L06.taglineZh: 今年要听到沉默的下面
L06.taglineEn: This year, hear below the silence

L07.taglineZh: 你和这个人会再次共振
L07.taglineEn: You'll resonate with this person again

L08.taglineEn: Be present, again, where presence matters

L09.taglineZh: 今年你的怀抱被人需要
L09.taglineEn: Your arms are needed this year

L11.taglineZh: 你能容纳的范围今年再扩一圈

L12.taglineZh: 不命令,只是再往前半步
L12.taglineEn: No command, just half a step further

T01.taglineZh: 你以为见底了,其实还有一层
T01.taglineEn: You thought you hit bottom — there's another layer

T02.taglineZh: 上一盏快灭了,今年再点一盏
T02.taglineEn: Last flame is fading, light another

T03.taglineEn: Last batch isn't pure enough yet

T04.taglineZh: 同一个谜面,今年看见另一层

T05.taglineEn: Last molting was just the warm-up

T06.taglineZh: 你看的不是来年,是来年的来年
T06.taglineEn: Not next year — the year after next

T07.taglineZh: 火热得正好,这次不再退
T07.taglineEn: The forge runs hot — don't pull back

T08.taglineZh: 你已熬过一个长夜,还有更长的等着
T08.taglineEn: One long night survived, longer one ahead

T09.taglineZh: 又一次闪电,这次轮到你给别人
T09.taglineEn: Lightning again — this time, you're the strike

T10.taglineZh: 上次没叫回来的,今年再叫一次
T10.taglineEn: The one you didn't recall, call again

T11.taglineZh: 上一口的水位还没到底
T11.taglineEn: The last well isn't yet at its true bottom

T12.taglineZh: 那条河有第二段,你要再撑一次篙
T12.taglineEn: The river has a second bend — pole through it

CC.taglineZh: 在创造的同一道路上换工具
CC.taglineEn: Same road of making, different tool

CL.taglineZh: 去年的作品,今年要被看见和串联
CL.taglineEn: Last year's work, this year's audience

CT.taglineZh: 外面的开拓需要里面的破开
CT.taglineEn: The outer build needs an inner break

LC.taglineZh: 从对话和共鸣里长出新作品

LT.taglineZh: 最深的转化在关系里发生
LT.taglineEn: The deepest change happens inside a bond

TL.taglineZh: 再深的潜也要光 / 这一年是光
TL.taglineEn: Even the deep dive needs a light
